title: wormia excelsa var. tomentella
intro: Wormia excelsa var. tomentella, also known as the Himalayan Sweet Wormwood, is a plant species that belongs to the genus Wormia and family Lamiaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, making it a potential antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Wormia excelsa var. tomentella include its potential use in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, and its anti-inflammatory properties, which may help reduce swelling and pain. Wormia excelsa var. tomentella is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
